display_name: YOUNG-RT (2026-07-09 real-time-native, AxiS "adapt to real-time"): young_absorb clone built for the post-latency-fix world. Runs under GLOBAL RT_ARM_MODE=enforce (arm from the live universe each fast tick, not after a scan cycle) + RT_DEMAND_TURN_MODE=enforce (fire on the FRESH net-flow turn, not the windowed lag) — the levers the loop-unstarve just unblocked. Plus the two latency-INDEPENDENT fleet wins: adaptive_swing_size (violent+shallow 0.45x tail-cut) + min_liquidity_usd=30000 (40k blocks 65% of young median-$36k liq -> throughput-fatal; 30k keeps ~70% firing while dropping the thin rug-adjacent band) (WR +10-12pp AND cuts entry slippage). NO hl_confirm (CONFIRMED never fires = trap). Paper, own pool. CONTROL = badday_young_absorb (same global RT, WITHOUT liq/size) -> isolates the config delta; whole RT-native fleet measured FORWARD vs the old broken-latency regime (the only honest way to price real-time). WATCH fills/day >=20 (liq floor drops throughput; RT_ARM adds it back).
